zh.lifeSummary: 當Rebecca Lathrop於1701年11月25日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波時，她的父親Hope Lathrop30歲，母親Elizabeth Lothrop24歲。她於1719年5月14日與Edward Lewis在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1747年6月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特享年45歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rebecca Lathrop于1701年11月25日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波时，她的父亲Hope Lathrop30岁，母亲Elizabeth Lothrop24岁。她于1719年5月14日与Edward Lewis在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1747年6月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特享年45岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特。

nameMeanings.name: Lathrop
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Laythorpe, a habitational name from Laythorpe, the former name of a settlement in Lincolnshire which is recorded as Ledulftorp in 1086 and Leilthorp in the 12th century. The placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Leithulfr + Old Norse thorp ‘secondary settlement, outlying farmstead’.

nameMeanings.name: Rebecca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from the Latin form of the Hebrew name Rebekah, borne by the wife of Isaac, who was the mother of Esau and Jacob (Genesis 24–27). The Hebrew root occurs in the Bible only in the vocabulary word marbek ‘cattle stall’, and its connection with the name is doubtful. In any case, Rebecca was Aramean, and the name probably has a source in Aramaic. It has always been common as a Jewish name; in England and elsewhere it began to be used also by Christians from the 14th century onwards and especially at the time of the Reformation, when Old Testament names became popular. It was very common among the Puritans in the 17th century, and has enjoyed a tremendous vogue in England since the latter part of the 20th century, among people of many different creeds. In Scotland this is found as an Anglicized form of Beathag .

en.lifeSummary: When Rebecca Lathrop was born on 25 November 1701, in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Hope Lathrop, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth Lothrop, was 24. She married Edward Lewis on 14 May 1719, in Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 22 June 1747, in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 45, and was buried in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rebecca Lathrop est née le 25 novembre 1701, à Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Hope Lathrop, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Lothrop, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Lewis le 14 mai 1719, à Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 juin 1747, à Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rebecca Lathrop am 25. November 1701 in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hope Lathrop 30 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Lothrop 24. Sie hat am 14. Mai 1719 in Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Edward Lewis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Juni 1747 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rebecca Lathrop è nata il il 25 novembre 1701 nel Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Hope Lathrop, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Lothrop, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Edward Lewis il 14 maggio 1719, nel Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 22 giugno 1747, nel Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Rebecca Lathropが1701年11月25日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルバーンスタブルで生まれた時，父Hope Lathropは30歳，母Elizabeth Lothropは24歳であった。1719年5月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルでEdward Lewisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1747年6月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベングイルフォードで45歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベングイルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rebecca Lathrop(이)가 1701년 11월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 바른스타블일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hope Lathrop(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Lothrop(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1719년 5월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일에서 Edward Lewis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1747년 6월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 길퍼드에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 길퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rebecca Lathrop nasceu em 25 de novembro de 1701, em Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Hope Lathrop, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Lothrop, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Lewis em 14 de maio de 1719, em Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de junho de 1747, em Guilford, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Guilford, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rebecca Lathrop родилась 25 ноября 1701 г. в местности барнстабл, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Hope Lathrop было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Lothrop, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Lewis 14 мая 1719 г. в местности барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 22 июня 1747 г. в местности гуилфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности гуилфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

Se casó con Edward Lewis el 14 de mayo de 1719, en Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas.
